symbols.description: Title symbol (π7) enclosed in parentheses, repeated as a fraction-like expression with /π7 in middle, and π7/(π7)
Small mu-like or arrow-like symbol beneath the title
Diamond outline symbol ◇ used as a bullet/separator

uncertain_or_unreadable: The body text is written in an unknown/constructed script that I cannot decode. Individual glyphs are also unidentifiable and may belong to a fictional or encoded alphabet.
The small symbol beneath the title is unclear — it resembles a lowercase 'μ' or a small arrow/dagger but I cannot identify it with confidence.
The relationship '(π7)/π7   π7/(π7)' at the top appears to be a stylistic title rather than a real mathematical expression.
